zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Leigh於1407年出生在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，她的父親Robert de Legh II83歲，母親Matilda d'Arderne61歲。她於大約1424年與Sir Thomas Davenport Esq在英國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年53歲，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Leigh于1407年出生在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德时，她的父亲Robert de Legh II83岁，母亲Matilda d'Arderne61岁。她于大约1424年与Sir Thomas Davenport Esq在英国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年53岁，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Leigh was born in 1407, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, her father, Robert de Legh II, was 83 and her mother, Matilda d'Arderne, was 61. She married Sir Thomas Davenport Esq about 1424, in England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1460, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 53, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Leigh est née en 1407, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Legh II, avait 83 ans et sa mère, Matilda d'Arderne, avait 61 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Davenport Esq environ 1424, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Leigh 1407 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Legh II 83 und ihre Mutter Matilda d'Arderne 61. Sie hat um 1424 in England Sir Thomas Davenport Esq geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Leigh è nata il nel 1407 nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Legh II, aveva 83 anni e sua madre, Matilda d'Arderne, aveva 61 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Davenport Esq circa 1424, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Leighが1407年にイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh IIは83歳，母Matilda d'Arderneは61歳であった。約1424年にイギリスでSir Thomas Davenport Esqと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にフランスピカーディソンメで53歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Leigh(이)가 1407년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Legh II(은)는 83세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda d'Arderne(은)는 61세였다. 그녀는 대략 1424년 영국에서 Sir Thomas Davenport Esq(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Leigh nasceu em 1407, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Legh II, tinha 83 anos e sua mãe, Matilda d'Arderne, tinha 61 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Davenport Esq aproximadamente 1424, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Leigh родилась в 1407 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Legh II было 83 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda d'Arderne, 61. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Davenport Esq около 1424 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Leigh nació en 1407, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Legh II, tenía 83 años y su mamá, Matilda d'Arderne, tenía 61 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Davenport Esq aproximadamente 1424, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1460, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Francia.
